calendar.matters:
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Aug-31-2011 Denied

Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Aug-31-2011 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-11-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: V. Mack; Sherry Sawyer CSR 5976 (Dept. 318)

Plaintiff Trinity Management Services, represented by Jacky Lopez, is available telehonically.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein, Esq., representing the plaintiff is also present.

Defendant Tim Wason is present.
Attorney Melvin Caesar Belli, Esq., representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 4475 - 23rd Street, #4, San Francisco, California.

The case is settled. The trial date of AUG-15-2011 is vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2011 Continued To Aug-11-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 318
